form.formComment: Recent form sound. At the latest run rolled along in front before being edged out 3rd of 7 at Sandown-Lakeside 3yo Bm64 on March 25 over 1600m, on a slow track; 1.75 len behind Mcwoody carrying 59kg at $9.50. The race before that won by 0.5 len at Kilmore Mdn-Sw March 6 over 1450m defeating Wonboyn with 59kg at $5. Going well and will take catching.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the lead during the early and middle stages.
Raced three wide without cover. Passing the 150m, shifted in.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 32-day let-up. Most recently 6th of 9 at Yarra Valley Bm62 on March 15 over 1950m, 3 len behind Xtrarevz with 59kg at $10. The run before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by a nose at Yarra Valley Mdn-Sw February 21 over 1968m defeating Golden Mask carrying 59.5kg at $7. Looking to others.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 300m, taken out by Zamparini Spirit.

form.formComment: Had two starts to date. At debut, 10th of 11 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 6 over 1200m, 5 len behind Deliberate Ploy with 57kg at $13. Second-up ran on strongly from last on the turn and won by 4 len at Cranbourne 3yo F Mdn-Sw March 27 over 1400m on a rain affected track defeating Savannah Queen carrying 57kg at $3.70. Dominant last time and can go right on with it to a mile.

form.formComment: Second-up. Previously second-up 8th of 12 at Flemington in the G3 Vanity on November 1 over 1400m, 5 len behind Sheza Alibi with 56kg at $21. Through a good race and this suits.
